chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Misc: Application No.S-716 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 20.10.2025 Mr.Abid Hussain Jamali, Advocate for applicant ********* Learned counsel for the applicant submits a copy of the case diary of the trial Court, which is taken on record. He further submits that the trial Court has passed the order; therefore, he no longer wishes to proceed with this matter, which is dismissed as withdrawn. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
